title: Hlabisa raises alarm after five initiation deaths in Eastern Cape
description: EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The Minister of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The Minister of Cooperative Governance and Traditional Affairs (CoGTA), Velenkosini Hlabisa, has expressed his concern about the current initiation season following five deaths in the Eastern Cape.","html":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The Minister of Cooperative Governance and Traditional Affairs (CoGTA), Velenkosini Hlabisa, has expressed his concern about the current initiation season following five deaths in the Eastern Cape."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The season runs from late November through to the end of January 2026 and already, hundreds of young initiates have stepped into this sacred passage, embarking on a journey they hope will return them home transformed, grounded, and prepared to carry the responsibilities of young manhood.","html":"“The season runs from late November through to the end of January 2026 and already, hundreds of young initiates have stepped into this sacred passage, embarking on a journey they hope will return them home transformed, grounded, and prepared to carry the responsibilities of young manhood."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Yet, despite ongoing appeals for vigilance and full compliance with the Customary Initiation Act, the Eastern Cape has already recorded five tragic deaths,“ the department’s statement read.","html":"“Yet, despite ongoing appeals for vigilance and full compliance with the Customary Initiation Act, the Eastern Cape has already recorded five tragic deaths,“ the department’s statement read."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One death has been recorded in Buffalo City Municipality, two in Chris Hani District Municipality, and two in OR Tambo District Municipality.","html":"One death has been recorded in Buffalo City Municipality, two in Chris Hani District Municipality, and two in OR Tambo District Municipality."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to the department, this serves as a stark and painful reminder of the work that still lies ahead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Minister warned that if the early warning signs are not addressed with strong commitment and prompt action, the situation could quickly escalate into a serious crisis that may result in the loss of even more precious lives.","html":"The Minister warned that if the early warning signs are not addressed with strong commitment and prompt action, the situation could quickly escalate into a serious crisis that may result in the loss of even more precious lives."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hlabisa sent a clear message to all illegal operators, urging them to cease their activities immediately.","html":"Hlabisa sent a clear message to all illegal operators, urging them to cease their activities immediately."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He described these operations as criminal, unsafe, and potentially lethal.","html":"He described these operations as criminal, unsafe, and potentially lethal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The department said government will not tolerate the reckless endangerment of children.","html":"The department said government will not tolerate the reckless endangerment of children."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“It is commendable that the Eastern Cape has already made 21 arrests linked to illegal initiation activities. This must continue, and other provinces must show the same level of resolve,” Hlabisa said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Minister has encouraged parents, caregivers and communities to step up and take full responsibility in protecting the young initiates entrusted to their care.","html":"The Minister has encouraged parents, caregivers and communities to step up and take full responsibility in protecting the young initiates entrusted to their care."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Initiation is more than a cultural tradition; it is a collective duty that demands vigilance, care and active participation from everyone.”","html":"“Initiation is more than a cultural tradition; it is a collective duty that demands vigilance, care and active participation from everyone.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Minister urges communities, including households without male figures who can monitor initiates regularly, to provide consistent guidance, support and protection throughout this sacred journey.","html":"The Minister urges communities, including households without male figures who can monitor initiates regularly, to provide consistent guidance, support and protection throughout this sacred journey."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He stressed that South Africa cannot allow a repeat of previous seasons marked by multiple tragedies.","html":"He stressed that South Africa cannot allow a repeat of previous seasons marked by multiple tragedies."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“One life lost is one too many. Every initiate must be guaranteed a safe return home, transformed and prepared to embrace the responsibilities of manhood.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To achieve this, the Minister has called on the National Initiation Oversight Committee (NIOC) and all Provincial Initiation Oversight Committees (PIOC) to intensify their oversight and coordination efforts.","html":"To achieve this, the Minister has called on the National Initiation Oversight Committee (NIOC) and all Provincial Initiation Oversight Committees (PIOC) to intensify their oversight and coordination efforts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Government believes that these committees should lead comprehensive, multi-sectoral teams to monitor, guide, and intervene when risks arise.","html":"Government believes that these committees should lead comprehensive, multi-sectoral teams to monitor, guide, and intervene when risks arise."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These teams should include representatives from municipalities, the Departments of Health, Social Development, and Education, the South African Police Service (SAPS), community elders, and non-governmental organisations (NGOs).","html":"These teams should include representatives from municipalities, the Departments of Health, Social Development, and Education, the South African Police Service (SAPS), community elders, and non-governmental organisations (NGOs)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Negligence or inaction cannot be tolerated. The safety and well-being of initiates is a sacred responsibility. Families, communities, and authorities alike must act decisively to ensure that every young man emerges from initiation alive, protected and honoured.”","html":"“Negligence or inaction cannot be tolerated. The safety and well-being of initiates is a sacred responsibility. Families, communities, and authorities alike must act decisively to ensure that every young man emerges from initiation alive, protected and honoured.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Minister called for surprise inspections of initiation schools, especially in high-risk areas, as part of a rigorous effort to combat unsafe practices and ensure compliance.","html":"The Minister called for surprise inspections of initiation schools, especially in high-risk areas, as part of a rigorous effort to combat unsafe practices and ensure compliance."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“The lives of our children are priceless. We cannot claim to uphold culture while allowing preventable tragedies to occur. This season must not spiral into a crisis."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We possess both the power and the responsibility to alter its course, and we must act decisively.”","html":"“We possess both the power and the responsibility to alter its course, and we must act decisively.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Where necessary, Hlabisa will visit affected provinces and municipalities to support local interventions and oversight efforts. – SAnews.gov.za","html":"Where necessary, Hlabisa will visit affected provinces and municipalities to support local interventions and oversight efforts. – SAnews.gov.za"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Hlabisa raises alarm after five initiation deaths in Eastern Cape
